subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #062 The Infinite Perfections of Existence and the Progress of the Soul in the Next World
subcodes.first_line: Know that the degrees of existence are finite—the degrees of servitude, of prophethood and of Divinity
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که مراتب وجود متناهیست مرتبهء عبودیت مرتبهء نبوت و مرتبهء ربوبیت
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed
